entity.summary: High-performance self-custodial decentralized trading venue focused on perpetual futures and broader capital markets, using trading-specific rollup infrastructure and unified margin.
entity.notes: Current first-party website and documentation expose live perpetual trading, self-custody, programmatic access, unified margin, high-speed execution, and a staged transition toward an Ethereum-based rollup design. Current independently maintained metrics report substantial non-zero perpetual volume, fees, revenue, TVL, and open interest. HEI models Reya Network, ReyaChain, and Reya DEX as one exchange entity rather than separate product records. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: Reya official documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Reya as a high-performance onchain exchange and trading-specific rollup, with perpetual markets, self-custodial settlement, unified margin, fast execution, and verifiable infrastructure.

evidence.title: Reya protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current protocol metrics report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day perpetual volume together with TVL, fees, revenue, and open interest, supporting active classification.
